title: Spot User
description: A Spot user represents an individual or programmatic identity with permissions to access and manage resources within a Spot organization.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

type.description: The type of user, either a human user or programmatic API user.

role.description: The role assigned to the user within an account.

organizationId.description: The identifier of the organization the user belongs to.
